features: All in One: obqo art craft supplies included 1x Pink Storage Box, 30x Multicolor Feathers, 100x Multicolor Paper, 100x Multicolor Craft Sticks, 100x Wooden Craft Sticks, 5x Different Paper Stickers, 30x Multicolor Glitter Pipe Cleaners, 30x Muticolor Pipe Cleaners, 200x Pom Poms, 300x Beads, 50x Buttons, 200x Eyes, 1x Strings, 600x Sequins, 1x Scissors, All in One for Prechool Craft DIY Art Supplies

Ideal Present - Funny & Meaningful:This handicraft set for children is suitable to give your children as a gift for any occasion such as New Year, birthday, Christmas etc. Or as a reward for good behavior for children, they will be happy and love this craft kit in no time. Children can use their imagination with their parents to create beautiful things together and improve relationships with each other

Leading Quality: Quality products, safe and environmental friendly craft kits in one box, a number of colorful craft items can meet different needs when they doing projects, a must need in the growth of preschool children
Useful DIY Kit: Craft supplies help children express themselves and enrich their growth rather than playing phones at home all day. Let your kids use their brains to create!
Warm tips: The product is not suitable for children under 3 years old. Parents should accompany their children when they are using scissor
